title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself poses minimal risk, but its widespread adoption could lead to potential misuse by malicious actors to identify exploitable vulnerabilities in unpatched systems.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment to assess its capabilities and ensure it aligns with organizational security policies.
Monitor for any updates or reports of misuse of the tool within the security community.
Educate teams on the responsible use of vulnerability scanning tools to prevent accidental exposure of sensitive systems.

title: A time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) condition in the ad_flush function in Netatalk 3.0.0 through...
description: A time-of-check time-of-use (TOCTOU) condition in the ad_flush function in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 involves root-privileged file operations, which may allow a remote attacker to cause limited data modification under specific race conditions.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7837.

title:

Network Module (CNM) contains

description:
Honeywell Control
Network Module (CNM) contains
insertion of sensitive information into an unintended directory. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability through probing
system files, potentially resulting in unintended
access to protected data.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5434.

title: Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 combines multiple errno values using bitwise OR, resulting in...
description: Netatalk 2.1.0 through 4.4.2 combines multiple errno values using bitwise OR, resulting in incorrect error codes when multiple error conditions occur simultaneously, which may allow a remote attacker to cause a minor service disruption via conditions that trigger incorrect error-handling paths.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in Netatalk may lead to incorrect error codes being generated during simultaneous error conditions, potentially causing minor service disruptions. This does not result in data breaches or privilege escalation but may affect system reliability.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest patched version of Netatalk if available.
Monitor system logs for unusual error patterns and service disruptions.
Implement network-level monitoring to detect and mitigate potential exploitation attempts.

title: Missing Authorization vulnerability in Tobias CF7 WOW Styler allows Exploiting Incorrectly...
description:
Missing Authorization vulnerability in Tobias CF7 WOW Styler allows Exploiting Incorrectly Configured Access Control Security Levels.

This issue affects CF7 WOW Styler: from n/a through 1.7.6.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The Missing Authorization vulnerability in Tobias CF7 WOW Styler could allow unauthorized users to exploit misconfigured access control settings, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data leaks, or modification of sensitive information. This could impact websites using the affected plugin version.
recommended_actions: Immediately update the CF7 WOW Styler plugin to the latest patched version, if available, or disable it temporarily if no patch exists.
Audit and review access control configurations on affected systems to ensure proper authorization mechanisms are in place.
Monitor logs for any unusual or unauthorized access attempts and implement additional security measures, such as web application firewalls (WAF), to mitigate potential exploitation.

title:
Honeywell Control
Network Module (CNM) contains command injection vulnerability
in the web...
description:
Honeywell Control
Network Module (CNM) contains command injection vulnerability
in the web interface. An attacker could exploit this vulnerability via command
delimiters, potentially resulting in Remote Code Execution (RCE).

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The command injection vulnerability in the Honeywell Control Network Module (CNM) web interface could allow attackers to execute arbitrary commands remotely, potentially leading to full system compromise, disruption of operations, and unauthorized access to sensitive data.
recommended_actions: Immediately apply any security patches or updates provided by Honeywell to address CVE-2026-5433.
Restrict access to the CNM web interface by implementing network segmentation and limiting access to trusted IP addresses.
Conduct a thorough review of network logs to identify any signs of exploitation and implement intrusion detection mechanisms to monitor for suspicious activity.

title: Mattermost versions 11.6.x <= 11.6.0, 11.5.x <= 11.5.3, 11.4.x <= 11.4.4, 10.11.x <= 10.11.14...
description: Mattermost versions 11.6.x <= 11.6.0, 11.5.x <= 11.5.3, 11.4.x <= 11.4.4, 10.11.x <= 10.11.14 fail to check integration URL for path traversal which allows an malicious authenticated user  to call an arbitrary API via system admin Mattermost auth token using via path traversal in integration action URL.. Mattermost Advisory ID: MMSA-2026-00640

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-4858.

title: The setcred(2) system call is only available to privileged users.  However, before the privilege...
description:
The setcred(2) system call is only available to privileged users.  However, before the privilege level of the caller is checked, the user-supplied list of supplementary groups is copied into a fixed-size kernel stack buffer without first validating its length.  If the supplied list exceeds the capacity of that buffer, a stack buffer overflow occurs.

Because the bounds check on the supplementary groups list occurs after the kernel stack buffer has already been written, an unprivileged local user

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with unknown severity. CVE: CVE-2026-45250.

title: A missing break statement in DSI OpenSession processing in Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 causes a...
description: A missing break statement in DSI OpenSession processing in Netatalk 1.5.0 through 4.4.2 causes a DSIOPT_ATTNQUANT switch case to fall through into DSIOPT_SERVQUANT, resulting in unintended session option handling that may allow a remote attacker to cause a minor service disruption via crafted DSI session options.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44075.

title: Improper input validation, Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in...
description:
Improper input validation, Unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability in Gmission Web Fax allows Remote Code Inclusion.

This issue affects Web Fax: from 3.0 before 3.1.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-9157.

title: Netatalk 3.1.2 through 4.4.2 is compiled without FORTIFY_SOURCE, which disables built-in buffer...
description: Netatalk 3.1.2 through 4.4.2 is compiled without FORTIFY_SOURCE, which disables built-in buffer overflow detection at runtime, potentially allowing a remote attacker to cause a minor denial of service via memory errors that would otherwise be caught and safely terminated by runtime protection.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with low severity. CVE: CVE-2026-44071.

title: A dead bounds check in the Spotlight RPC unmarshaller in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 results in...
description: A dead bounds check in the Spotlight RPC unmarshaller in Netatalk 3.0.0 through 4.4.2 results in an unreachable code path that provides no effective bounds protection, which may allow a remote authenticated attacker to obtain limited information via crafted Spotlight RPC requests.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote authenticated attacker to exploit a dead bounds check in the Spotlight RPC unmarshaller, potentially leading to limited information disclosure. The impact is constrained due to the requirement for authentication and the limited scope of information exposure.
recommended_actions: Upgrade Netatalk to the latest patched version beyond 4.4.2 to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to Spotlight RPC services to trusted users and networks using firewall rules or access control lists.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity related to Spotlight RPC requests and implement additional logging for early detection.

title: Exposure of Sensitive System Information to an Unauthorized Control Sphere vulnerability in...

title: An unbounded memory reallocation in the charset conversion code in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2...
description: An unbounded memory reallocation in the charset conversion code in Netatalk 2.0.0 through 4.4.2 allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a minor denial of service via crafted character conversion requests.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows a remote authenticated attacker to cause a minor denial of service by exploiting unbounded memory reallocation in the charset conversion code. The impact is limited due to the requirement for authentication and the low severity of the issue.
recommended_actions: Update Netatalk to the latest patched version once available to mitigate the vulnerability.
Restrict access to Netatalk services to trusted users and networks to minimize exposure.
Monitor system logs for unusual activity related to charset conversion requests to detect potential exploitation attempts.

description: Mattermost versions 11.5.x <= 11.5.1 fail to validate team-level run_create permission against the target team when creating a playbook run which allows an authenticated team member to create runs in teams where they lack permission via specifying a different team ID in the run creation API request. title: Insufficient sanitization of volume paths in Netatalk 3.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a local...
description: Insufficient sanitization of volume paths in Netatalk 3.1.0 through 4.4.2 allows a local privileged user to inject OS commands and execute arbitrary code via a crafted volume path.

recommended_actions: Upgrade Netatalk to the latest patched version as soon as it becomes available.

Implement additional input sanitization measures to mitigate risks of crafted volume paths.

title: Mattermost Mobile Apps versions <=2.37 11.4 2.0.37 11.0.4 11.1.3 11.3.2 10.11.11.0 fail to...
description: Mattermost Mobile Apps versions <=2.37 11.4 2.0.37 11.0.4 11.1.3 11.3.2 10.11.11.0 fail to properly validate the SSO authentication callback origin which allows an attacker controlling a malicious Mattermost server to steal user credentials for a legitimate Mattermost server via relaying the SSO code exchange flow through the mobile application. title: CVE-2026-1184 - GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 11.9 before 18.9.7, 18.10 be
description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 11.9 before 18.9.7, 18.10 before 18.10.6, and 18.11 before 18.11.3 that could have allowed an unauthenticated user to cause denial of service by uploading a specially crafted file due to improper validation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-1184.

title: CVE-2025-15345 - The MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripti
description: The MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'map' parameter in the display-map shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.27 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performing an action such as clicking on a link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows unauthenticated attackers to execute malicious scripts in the context of a user's browser, potentially leading to session hijacking, phishing attacks, or unauthorized actions on affected websites. This could compromise user data and website integrity.
recommended_actions: Update the MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin to a patched version (if available) or disable the plugin temporarily until a fix is released.
Implement a web application firewall (WAF) to block malicious requests targeting the 'map' parameter.
Educate users and administrators to avoid clicking on suspicious links, especially those containing the vulnerable parameter.

title: CVE-2025-14870 - GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.5 before 18.9.7, 18.10
description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.5 before 18.9.7, 18.10 before 18.10.6, and 18.11 before 18.11.3 that could have allowed an unauthenticated user to cause denial of service by sending specially crafted JSON payloads due to insufficient input validation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to cause a denial of service (DoS) by exploiting insufficient input validation in GitLab CE/EE. This could disrupt critical development pipelines, CI/CD processes, and project management activities, leading to operational downtime and potential financial losses.
recommended_actions: Immediately update GitLab CE/EE to the latest patched versions (18.9.7, 18.10.6, or 18.11.3) to mitigate the vulnerability.
Review and monitor server logs for unusual activity or signs of exploitation, particularly unexpected JSON payloads.
Implement Web Application Firewall (WAF) rules to detect and block malicious JSON payloads targeting GitLab instances.

description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 18.5 before 18.9.7, 18.10 before 18.10.6, and 18.11 before 18.11.3 that could have allowed an unauthenticated user to cause denial of service by sending specially crafted payloads on certain API endpoints.

description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab CE/EE affecting all versions from 15.11 before 18.9.7, 18.10 before 18.10.6, and 18.11 before 18.11.3 that could have allowed an authenticated user to inject HTML and JavaScript into email notifications sent to other users due to improper input sanitization.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-12669.

title: CVE-2026-7648 - The LearnPress – WordPress LMS Plugin for Create and Sell Online Courses plugin for WordPress is vul
description: The LearnPress – WordPress LMS Plugin for Create and Sell Online Courses plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to payment bypass through user-controlled key in all versions up to, and including, 4.3.5. This is due to improper handling of user-supplied request parameters in the REST API endpoint, which passes the unsanitized parameter array to the add_to_cart() function where array_merge() allows attacker-controlled values to overwrite hardcoded defaults. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to enroll in any paid course entirely free of charge by supplying a quantity value of zero, which causes the order total to calculate as $0 and bypasses all payment gateway requirements.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7648.

title: CVE-2026-7525 - The My Calendar – Accessible Event Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypas
description: The My Calendar – Accessible Event Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 3.7.9. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with custom-level access and above, to bypass the moderation and approval workflow by tampering with the POST body to publish events or set other unauthorized statuses such as cancelled or private, in ways their role does not permit. While the UI correctly restricts low-privilege users to a draft-only submit button, this restriction is enforced only client-side, making it trivially bypassable by directly manipulating the POST request.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7525.

title: CVE-2026-5361 - The Envira Gallery Lite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the RE
description: The Envira Gallery Lite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the REST API in versions up to and including 1.12.4. This is due to insufficient input sanitization in the update_gallery_data() function and improper output escaping in the gallery_init() function. The sanitize_config_values() function only sanitizes the justified_gallery_theme and justified_row_height parameters, but does not sanitize the arrows parameter. When the arrows value is output in the inline JavaScript configuration, it uses esc_attr() which is designed for HTML attribute contexts, not JavaScript contexts, allowing JavaScript expression injection. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5361.

title: CVE-2026-5486 - The Unlimited Elements for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'da
description: The Unlimited Elements for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'data[filter_search]' parameter in the get_cat_addons AJAX action in versions up to and including 2.0.7. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and the use of deprecated escaping functions combined with direct string concatenation in SQL query construction. The vulnerability is exacerbated because the normalizeAjaxInputData() function calls stripslashes() on all user input, removing the protection provided by WordPress's wp_magic_quotes() function. Subsequently, the filter_search parameter is escaped using the deprecated wpdb->_escape() function and then directly concatenated into a LIKE clause without using prepared statements. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above (who can obtain a valid nonce through the Elementor editor), to inject arbitrary SQL commands and extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5486.

title: CVE-2026-46446 - SOGo before 5.12.7, when PostgreSQL or MariaDB is used, and cleartext passwords are stored, allows S
description: SOGo before 5.12.7, when PostgreSQL or MariaDB is used, and cleartext passwords are stored, allows SQL injection. This is related to c_password = '%@' in changePasswordForLogin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-46446.

title: CVE-2026-44919 - In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in checksum
description: In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in checksum calculations can occur via the file:///dev/zero URL.

title: CVE-2026-41281 - Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of Sensi
description: Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (CWE-319) vulnerability. A man-in-the-middle attacker may access and modify communications transmitted in plaintext, potentially resulting in information disclosure or data tampering.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41281.
